icell.name: iCELL Series
icell.tagline: Compact STP for Single Households & Rural Areas
description: Danmotech iCELL packaged wastewater treatment plants are designed for treating sewage water from single households in rural areas, independent residential buildings, villas, and small residential communities.

The iCELL system is typically installed after a septic tank, either in-ground or above ground. The population coverage of a single iCELL unit covers 3–6 people, with capacity scaling through modular combinations.
features: Modified A/O process combining activated sludge and biofilm technologies
Patented fixed plate biofilm carrier for enhanced COD and TN removal
Effluent meets Class B discharge standard (GB18918-2016)
Optional solar panel power supply for zero operating cost
Optional intelligent monitoring with remote operation control
Single module capacity: 0.5–1 t/d for 3–6 persons
advantages: Highly integrated system, easy to install and test
Short start-up time with less residual sludge
Good effluent quality suitable for flushing, greening, and irrigation
PE material — no pollution, long service life
No noise and no secondary pollution
Integrated solar power supply option

icube.name: iCUBE Series
icube.tagline: Containerized STP for Communities & Commercial Facilities
description: Danmotech iCUBE systems are containerized wastewater treatment plants commonly used for distributed populations, camps, oil rig sites, and remote locations.

Designed for small-to-medium residential areas, schools, hospitals, hotels, and commercial facilities. The modular container design (20HQ and 40HQ) enables flexible capacity scaling from 50 to over 130,000 people.
features: Modified A/O process combining activated sludge and bio-film technologies
Patented HBF biological wastewater treatment for energy savings
Fixed plate biofilm carrier enhances nitrogen removal
Remote monitoring via environmental intelligent cloud platform
Single module capacity: 50–200 t/d
Population coverage: 300–2,000 persons per module
Occupation area: 0.20–0.45 m²/t
Energy consumption: 0.20–0.50 KW·h/t
advantages: Meets strict municipal wastewater discharge standards
Plug & play solution with easy installation
Treated water reusable for irrigation and flushing
Short construction period with standardized production
Intelligent monitoring — online and Mobile App
No secondary pollution (sludge, exhaust gas, noise)
Stable performance with strong impulse load resistance

ishell.name: iSHELL Series
ishell.tagline: Advanced Packaged STP with German Fixed-Bed Biofilm Technology
description: Danmotech iSHELL packaged sewage treatment plant adopts German advanced fixed-bed biofilm carrier technology, introduced in 2013 and mass produced since 2014. The same type is widely used across developed European countries.

The iSHELL solution combines three parts — septic tank, bio-tank, and sedimentation tank. With different volumes and combinations, treatment capacity scales flexibly, like LEGO bricks. The modular PE composite design enables underground installation, preserving surface land.
features: German advanced fixed-bed biofilm carrier technology with 20+ year lifespan
Progressive flow between tanks without external power — intermittent aeration reduces costs
PE adjusting tank replaces concrete septic tank, shortening installation cycle
Two-stage biological treatment: high-load reactor (100 m²/m³) and low-load reactor (150 m²/m³)
Nitrification liquid reflux system available per customer requirements
Seamless PE tank with antioxidants and UV-resistant additives resists all corrosion types
Corrugated shape designed by German experts — strong structure with good appearance
High anti-floating performance, no additional anti-floating measures needed
advantages: Divided structure for convenient transportation and hoisting
Automatic control system with intelligent monitoring
German imported pipe microhole aerator for even aeration
Special polyurethane film material for biofilm carriers
Small volume, light weight — easy to install and transport
Service life exceeds 20 years
Patented buried PE tank and high-efficiency combined STP design
applicationAreas: Domestic sewage: rural areas, towns, and small markets
Municipal & commercial: hotels, communities, entertainment venues, highway service areas
Public transport: bus stations, railway stations, passenger terminals, rail transit hubs

wwtp.name: Waste Water Treatment Plant
description: Danmotech integrates world-class wastewater treatment technologies to provide effective and advanced solutions for municipal and industrial applications.

For large-scale projects requiring detailed evaluation of local regulations, environment, and waste water composition, we provide professional consultation including site blueprints and construction guidance supported by our patented HBF and UC reactor technologies.
features: Patented HBF (High-efficiency Biofilm) technology
UC reactor for advanced treatment stages
Comprehensive project evaluation and consultation
Site-specific blueprint and construction planning
Integration of global best-in-class treatment technologies
On-site expert guidance during construction
advantages: 10+ years of wastewater treatment expertise
Professional consultation from evaluation to commissioning
Access to the newest global treatment technologies
High cost-effectiveness for energy and economy savings
On-site construction guidance by expert teams
Comprehensive after-sales support and maintenance
